questions.question: Under each paired permission posture in the canonical public synthetic starter fixture, what fraction of the same declared message population is materialized as authorized normalized evidence?

population.subject: messages in the canonical public synthetic starter fixture declared visible in at least one paired Bot API or TDLib mode
population.definition: one unique conversation_id and message_id pair with non-empty fixture text whose visible_in_modes includes bot_api or tdlib_user_session and agrees with its conversation permission envelope
population.inclusion_rule: every valid unique message in the complete non-empty paired-mode population of the canonical public synthetic starter fixture
population.exclusion_rule: messages outside the paired starter modes, message bodies, conversation and message identities, authors, chat or source refs, attachments, entities, operator-local registries and receipts, live or private Telegram data, index and graph artifacts, eval outcomes, readiness, proof, and runtime state

measurements.authority_ceiling: Reports only the ratio of authorized normalized messages from the same public synthetic starter population under paired bot_api and tdlib_user_session modes at one source revision; it does not establish real bot or connected-account authorization, live channel, group, private-chat, or Saved Messages coverage, source completeness, index or graph quality, retrieval or answer quality, connector readiness, eval success, proof verdicts, or runtime health.
